mapper.select: select u.id as userId,u.nickname,u.avatar (COUNT(a.id) * 10 + CASE WHEN u.last_login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activeScore from user u left join article a on u.id = a.user_id and a.status='1' and a.updated_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) group by u.id order by activeScore desc limit #{size}
